description_long: This is a retro-style television with a rounded rectangular body finished in a vibrant magenta color, standing on four slender, dark purple legs. The front features a convex black screen surrounded by a magenta bezel, with three large control knobs and a horizontal speaker grille below. Two long, black V-shaped antennas extend from a purple dome on the top, and a black power cord with a two-prong plug trails from the back. The sides are adorned with playful stickers, including a cartoon rooster and food items, and one side has a circular black vent. The surface shows some wear and smudges, giving it a slightly used, urban look. The overall design is whimsical and eye-catching, blending vintage aesthetics with a touch of street art.
description: A magenta retro television with a convex black screen, purple legs, V-shaped antennas, and playful stickers on the sides.
description_view_0: The back view shows the magenta casing, two antennas, a power cord, and a rooster sticker near the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view displays two stickers (a burger and a cat), the power cord, and the smooth magenta surface.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the convex black screen, three control knobs, a speaker grille, and the purple legs.
description_view_3: The right side view features a large circular black vent, a sticker, and the trailing power cord.
attribute_bezel_design: thick magenta plastic bezel with rounded corners and a matte finish
attribute_control_button_layout: three large knobs in a row below the screen
